info.title: Double API
info.description:
Welcome to the Double API!

**Authentication**

This API uses OAuth2 for authentication. To try out the API through this UI, you will need to:

1. **Obtain Your Credentials:**
   Get your client ID and Client Secret. You can request these from your CSM or our support team at help@doublehq.com. You can also create a new OAuth client by clicking the "Generate API Key" button in the "General" section of practice settings.

2. **Open the "Authorize" menu below:**
   Use your credentials to request an access token from our OAuth2 token endpoint by clicking the "Authorize" button below and providing your Client ID and Client Secret.

3. **Try out the endpoint:**
   Select an endpoint from the list below and click "Try it out" to make a request. Your requests will be authorized using the access token you obtained in step 2.

To obtain a token programmatically you can use the following curl command:

```curl
curl --location 'https://api.doublehq.com/oauth/token' \
--header 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' \
--data-urlencode 'grant_type=client_credentials' \
--data-urlencode 'client_id=XXXX' \
--data-urlencode 'client_secret=XXXX'
```

Oauth2 tokens only need to be generated once a day. They can be used for multiple requests, but expire after 24 hours.

**Rate Limits**

The API enforces a rate limit of 300 requests per 5-minute window per OAuth client. Rate limits are applied on a rolling window basis.

If you exceed the rate limit, you will receive a 429 Too Many Requests HTTP status code.

get.summary: Get list of contacts for a practice

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Filter contacts by email address

parameters.name: phoneNumber
parameters.description: Filter contacts by phone number (any format accepted - will be normalized to digits only)

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of contacts to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of contacts to return (maximum 100)

post.description:
Creates a new contact in the practice. The contact will be created with a Firebase user account and can be linked to one or more clients.

**Important:** The contact's email must be unique within the practice. If a contact with the same email already exists in the practice, the request will fail with a 409 Conflict error.

email.description: Contact's email address (must be unique within the practice)

phoneNumber.description: Contact's phone number (required, must match phone number format)

clientIds.description: Array of client IDs to link the contact to

hasClientAdminAccess.description: Whether the contact has client admin access

hasTaxAccess.description: Whether the contact has tax access

hasFinancialAccess.description: Whether the contact has financial access

hasFilesAccess.description: Whether the contact has files access

isMFAEnabled.description: Whether multi-factor authentication is enabled for the contact

400.description: Bad request - validation error (e.g., invalid email format, invalid phone number format, missing required fields)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing OAuth token

409.description: Conflict - contact with the same email already exists in the practice

message.example: This contact already exists in this practice

parameters.name: contactId
parameters.description: The ID of the contact to retrieve (must be a positive integer)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing OAuth token

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions to access this contact

patch.description:
Updates contact information. All fields are optional - only provided fields will be updated.

**Note:** When updating `clientIds`, any clients that are removed from the list will have the contact's email removed from their `sendToEmail` field.

parameters.name: contactId
parameters.description: The ID of the contact to update (must be a positive integer)

clientIds.description: Array of client IDs to link the contact to (replaces existing clientIds)

hasClientAdminAccess.description: Whether the contact has client admin access

hasTaxAccess.description: Whether the contact has tax access

hasFinancialAccess.description: Whether the contact has financial access

hasFilesAccess.description: Whether the contact has files access

mfaEnabled.description: Whether multi-factor authentication is enabled for the contact

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing OAuth token

403.description: Forbidden - insufficient permissions to access this contact

- If provided, the note is associated with the client.  
- If not, the note is associated at the practice level.

post.description:
Creates a new client portal post. Supports two types:
- **userToContactQuestion**: Questions from users to contacts (requires sentByUserId) - **contactToUserQuestion**: Questions from contacts to users (requires sentByContactId)
**Validation Rules:** - For `userToContactQuestion`: `sentByUserId` is required, `sentByContactId` is forbidden - For `contactToUserQuestion`: `sentByContactId` is required, `sentByUserId` is forbidden - `userToContactQuestionMetadata` is only allowed for `userToContactQuestion` type

initialClientPortalMessage.message: What documents do you need for tax preparation?
I have a question about my invoice

message.example: sentByUserId is required for userToContactQuestion, sentByContactId is required for contactToUserQuestion

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing OAuth token

parameters.description: Filter tasks updated from this timestamp

parameters.name: updatedToTimestamp
parameters.description: Filter tasks updated up to this timestamp

200.description: Custom (former non-closing) tasks count retrieved successfully

count.description: The count of custom (former non-closing) tasks

get.description:
Retrieve a list of timers filtered by various optional query parameters such as client ID,
start or creation timestamps, timer type, work stream, and user.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter by client ID.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of timers to return (pagination).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of timers to skip (pagination).

parameters.name: startedFromTimestamp
parameters.description: Retrieve timers whose interval overlaps or occurs after this timestamp (i.e., timers that have not ended before it).

parameters.name: startedToTimestamp
parameters.description: Retrieve timers whose interval overlaps or occurs before this timestamp (i.e., timers that start before it).

parameters.name: createdFromTimestamp
parameters.description: Retrieve timers created after this timestamp.

parameters.name: createdToTimestamp
parameters.description: Retrieve timers created before this timestamp.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter timers by type.

parameters.name: workStreamId
parameters.description: Filter timers by work stream ID.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter timers by user ID.

get.description:
Retrieve the total number of timers that match the specified filters.
Note that pagination parameters are not used for counting.

parameters.name: clientId
parameters.description: Filter by client ID.

parameters.name: startedFromTimestamp
parameters.description: Count timers with a start time after this timestamp.

parameters.name: startedToTimestamp
parameters.description: Count timers with a start time before this timestamp.

parameters.name: createdFromTimestamp
parameters.description: Count timers created after this timestamp.

parameters.name: createdToTimestamp
parameters.description: Count timers created before this timestamp.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter timers by type.

parameters.name: workStreamId
parameters.description: Filter timers by work stream ID.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: Filter timers by user ID.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of users to skip

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of users to return

post.description:
Creates a new user in the practice and sends an invitation email.

**Important:** This endpoint automatically sends an invitation email to the new user with a secure join link. The user must use this link to set their password and complete account setup. Without this email, the user account cannot be accessed.

**Validation Rules:**
- Admin users (practiceAdmin) cannot have selectedAccounts (they have access to all clients)
- Admin users automatically get tax access enabled

email.description: User's email address (will receive invitation email)

isMFAEnabled.description: Whether MFA is enabled for the user

role.description: User's role (admin roles auto-enable tax access and cannot have selectedAccounts)

selectedAccounts.description: Client IDs the user has access to (not allowed for admin roles)

hasTaxAccess.description: Whether user has tax access (automatically enabled for admin roles)

id.description: The ID of the newly created user

400.description: Bad request - validation error (e.g., admin users cannot have selectedAccounts)

409.description: User with the same email already exists

get.description: Retrieves information about a specific user. Access is restricted to users within the same practice. Returns the same schema as the GET /api/users list endpoint.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to retrieve

patch.description:
Updates user information. All fields are optional.

**Note:** Email cannot be updated via this endpoint. Use a dedicated email change flow if needed.

**Validation Rules:**
- Admin users (practiceAdmin) cannot have selectedAccounts (they have access to all clients)
- Promoting a user to admin role automatically clears selectedAccounts and enables tax access
- At least one field must be provided in the request body

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to update

isMFAEnabled.description: Whether MFA is enabled for the user

role.description: User's role (promoting to admin auto-enables tax access and clears selectedAccounts)

selectedAccounts.description: Client IDs the user has access to (not allowed for admin roles)

400.description: Bad request - no fields to update or validation error (e.g., admin users cannot have selectedAccounts)

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to delete

get.summary: Get list of branches for a specific user
get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of branches associated with a specific user based on their branch access

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user to get branches for

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of branches to skip for pagination

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of branches to return (maximum 100)

401.description: Unauthorized - invalid or missing OAuth token

403.description: Forbidden - user does not have access to the requested user

put.summary: Grant user access to a branch

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: ID of the branch to grant access to

delete.summary: Revoke user access to a branch

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user

parameters.name: branchId
parameters.description: ID of the branch to revoke access from

patch.summary: Update personal inbox setting for user

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the user

isPracticeInboxEnabled.description: Enable or disable practice inbox access

isClientEmailHistoryEnabled.description: Enable or disable client email history access
